primary_text:
Families across Sydney already collect fresh food from the Brookvale hub every week. They know their farmers by name.

Now they can own a piece of it too.

FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. Named regenerative farms across NSW. No middlemen. Food that's days old, not weeks.

Mid-2026, FarmThru is opening equity crowdfunding on Birchal. Customers, farmers, and anyone who believes food should work differently can become part-owners.

Be a partner, not just a customer.
headline: Customers are becoming co-owners
description: FarmThru equity crowdfunding on Birchal, mid-2026. Not financial advice.
creative_brief: Warm community moment at the Brookvale hub -- real people collecting bags. Overlaid text: 'Customers are becoming co-owners'. Not staged.
